title: Egghead Opening — Chapter 1062
main_description: The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush. This chapter contains 6 structured story parts and 198 cleaned dialogue lines.
